creator: lx@redundancy.redundancy.org
text:
Thanks for the update. It now fails to package, due to the docs not
being installed:

===>  Installing for amarokFS-0.5
===>   Generating temporary packing list
===>  Checking if audio/amarokFS already installed
cp -f "amarokFS" "/tmp/amarokFS-0.5/bin/amarokFS"
cp -f "images/gradient.png" "/tmp/amarokFS-0.5/share/amarokFS/images/"
cp -f "images/logo.png" "/tmp/amarokFS-0.5/share/amarokFS/images/"
cp -f "images/logoB.png" "/tmp/amarokFS-0.5/share/amarokFS/images/"

cp -f "theme.xml" "/tmp/amarokFS-0.5/share/amarokFS/"

`.' is up to date.
